# Spinning Drop Method

**Summary**: A method to measure interfacial tension (IFT) between two immiscible fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] used spinning drop method to quantify the reduction of interfacial tension by various surfactant systems.

## Key Results and Findings

- The measurement range of this instrument is 10^-6 to 2000 mN/m with a resolution of 10^-6 mN/m. ([[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022, p. 28]])
